name: io.github.pineforge-4pass/pineforge-codegen-mcp
title: PineForge — offline PineScript v6 backtest MCP
description: Offline MCP server: an AI agent transpiles PineScript v6 to C++ and runs deterministic, TradingView-parity backtests locally (245/246 strict, 0 engine bugs). One Docker container, no API key; code and data stay on the machine.
